vllm.title: Add a script for serving experiments & Collect system stats in scheduler
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Example usage:

Generating a single completion: python benchmark/benchmark_text_completion.py --dataset alpaca_opt_text_completion.pkl  --model facebook/opt-13b --request-rate 1.0 --duration 3600 --n1 1.0
Generating two completions in parallel: python benchmark/benchmark_text_completion.py --dataset
